memberdef.argsstring: (wave vals, WaveText keys, variable sweepNo, string device, variable entrySourceType)
memberdef.name: ED_AddEntriesToLabnotebook

briefdescription.para: Add numerical/textual entries to the labnotebook.

memberdef.argsstring: (WaveText incomingTextualValues, WaveText incomingTextualKeys, variable sweepNo, variable entrySourceType, variable logbookType, string device=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: ED_createTextNotes

briefdescription.para: Add textual entries to the logbook.

detaileddescription.para: The text documentation wave will use layers to report the different headstages.
The incoming value wave can have zero to nine (NUM_HEADSTAGES + 1) layers. The first eight layers are for headstage dependent data, the last layer for headstage independent data.

parameterdescription.para: incoming Text Documentation Wave sent by the each reporting subsystem
incoming Text Documentation key wave that is used to reference the incoming settings wave
sweep number
[optional for logbookType LBT_RESULTS only] device
type of reporting subsystem, one of DataAcqModes
type of the logbook, one of LogbookTypes

briefdescription.para: Return the headstage contigency mode for values.

memberdef.argsstring: (wave incomingNumericalValues, WaveText incomingNumericalKeys, variable sweepNo, variable entrySourceType, variable logbookType, string device=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: ED_createWaveNotes

briefdescription.para: Add numerical entries to the labnotebook.

detaileddescription.para: The history wave will use layers to report the different headstages.
The incoming value wave can have zero to nine LABNOTEBOOK_LAYER_COUNT layers. The first eight layers are for headstage dependent data, the last layer for headstage independent data.

parameterdescription.para: settingsWave sent by the each reporting subsystem
key wave that is used to reference the incoming settings wave
sweep number
[optional for logbooktype LBT_RESULTS only] device
type of reporting subsystem, one of DataAcqModes
one of LogbookTypes

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, string key, wave values, string unit=defaultValue, variable tolerance=defaultValue, variable overrideSweepNo=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: ED_AddEntryToLabnotebook

briefdescription.para: Add custom entries to the numerical/textual labnotebook for the very last sweep acquired.

detaileddescription.para: The entries are prefixed with USER_ to distinguish them from stock MIES entries.
The index of the entry in values determines the headstage to which the setting applies. You can not set both headstage dependent and independent values at the same time as this does not make sense.

Sample invocation: embed:rst:leading-asterisk * .. code-block:: igorpro * * Make/D/FREE/N=(LABNOTEBOOK_LAYER_COUNT) values = NaN * values[0] = 4711 // setting of the first headstage * ED_AddEntryToLabnotebook(device, "SomeSetting", values) *
The later on the labnotebook can be queried with: embed:rst:leading-asterisk * .. code-block:: igorpro * * WAVE/Z settings = GetLastSetting(values, NaN, LABNOTEBOOK_USER_PREFIX + key, UNKNOWN_MODE) *

parameterdescription.para: device
name under which to store the entry.

entry to add, wave can be numeric (floating point) or text, must have LABNOTEBOOK_LAYER_COUNT rows. It can be all NaN or empty (text), this is useful if you want to make the key known without adding an entry.
[optional, defaults to ""] physical unit of the entry
[optional, defaults to LABNOTEBOOK_NO_TOLERANCE] tolerance of the entry, used for judging if a change is "relevant" and should then be written to the sweep wave
[optional, defaults to last acquired sweep] Adds metadata to the given sweep number. Mostly useful for adding labnotebook entries during MID_SWEEP_EVENT for analysis functions.

briefdescription.para: Record changed labnotebook entries compared to the last sweep to the sweep wave note.

detaileddescription.para: Honours tolerances defined in the keywave and LABNOTEBOOK_BINARY_UNIT values

briefdescription.para: Record changed labnotebook entries compared to the last sweep to the sweep wave note.

detaileddescription.para: Honours tolerances defined in the keywave and LABNOTEBOOK_BINARY_UNIT values

memberdef.argsstring: (WaveText incomingKey, wave incomingValues, WaveText key, wave values, variable logbookType)
memberdef.name: ED_FindIndizesAndRedimension

briefdescription.para: Returns the column indizes of each parameter in incomingKey into the key wave.

detaileddescription.para: Redimensions key and values waves. Prefills key with incomingKey data if necessary.
Ensures that key and values have a matching column size at return.

parameterdescription.para: text wave with the keys to add
wave with the values to add
key wave of the labnotebook (Rows: 1/3/6, Columns: Same as values, Layers: 1)
values/data wave of the labnotebook
type of the logbook, one of LogbookTypes
column indizes of the entries from incomingKey
returns the row index into values at which the new values should be written

briefdescription.para: Remember the "exact" start of the sweep.

detaileddescription.para: Should be called immediately after HW_StartAcq().

briefdescription.para: Add sweep specific information to the labnotebook.
Write the user comment from the DA_Ephys panel to the labnotebook.
This function is used to create wave notes for the informations found in the Asynchronous tab in the DA_Ephys panel.
Stores test pulse related data in the labnotebook.
Document the settings of the Testpulse.

detaileddescription.para: The source type entry is not fixed. We want to document the testpulse settings during ITI and the testpulse settings for plain test pulses.

parameterdescription.para: device
sweep number
type of reporting subsystem, one of DataAcqModes

briefdescription.para: ED Writing numerical/textual information to the labnotebook
